entry.content:
C++ FAQ

1. operator delete重载

output
entry.summary: C++ FAQ

entry.title: SPFS
entry.content:
SPFS

Module Agenda

  • Basic Linux filesystem information
  • Where is the Linux filesystem code?
  • Who uses what filesystems?
  • Where do filesystems sit in the kernel?
  • How to get started with filesystem development
  • Some basic SPFS information
1. How many Filesystems?
  • Linux has over 80 different filesystems
  • They fall into several different categories:
    • Disk-based filesystems, filesystems with built-in fault-tolerance, filesystems optimized for flash memory, solid state media, record-oriented filesystems, shared-disk filesystems, distributed filesystems, distributed fault-tolerant filesystems, distributed parallel filesystems, distirbuted parallel fault-tolerant filesystems, peer-to-peer filesystems, special-purpose filesystems, pseudo filesystems, encrypted filesystems.
    • There are many filesystems not in the source tree
2. Whre Are They?
  • All different kernels can be found at www.kernel.org
  • Filesystems are located under the fs directory, for example:
    • linux-6.5.5/fs
3. Which Distributions Use Which Filesystems?
DistributionFils System
Ubuntu/Debianext4
Fedorabtrfs
CentOSXFS (CentOS EOL - Rocky?)
RHELXFS - was ext4 up to RHEL 6.0
OpenSuSEbtrfs
SLESXFS
Androidext4 or one of the flash-based filesystems such as YAFFS2
4. How Much Code?
  • High-end
    • XFS - 73,000 LOC
    • btrfs - 151,000 LOC
    • ext4 - 63,000 LOC
    • NFS - 73,000 LOC
  • Low-end
    • bfs - 1,000 LOC
    • ext2 - 9,000 LOC
5. Complexity
  • There are 4 vectors of (over 100) operations that filesystems can provide:
    • inode_operations - 29 different operations
    • super_operations - 19 different operations
    • file_operation - 33 different operations
    • address_space_operations - 22 different operations
  • No filesystem provide all functions
  • SPFS provides only a small number (depends on file type)

6. Where Would I Normally Start?
  • bfs, sysvfs, fat, …
  • Look at features. Less features the better!
    • Filesystems are optimized for performance
    • This makes the code harder to understand
  • But no need. That’s what SPFS is for!
7. SPFS was Developed for Teaching
  • It’s as simple as you can get
  • It will be updated once per year (Ubuntu x.04 releases)
  • It has prints() calls for each function - viewed with dmesg(1)
  • It’s also backed by an online open-source filesystem book
    • https://github.com/stevedpate/linux-fs-book
    • 450 pages and counting… looking for help to move it forwards
    • There is a chapter on SPFS

Module Agenda

  • Basic SPFS information including features/properties/limitations
  • Important SPFS structures
  • SPFS disk layout
  • What happens during filesystem creation
1. Basic Information
  • A Linux filesystem contains the following minimal items:
    • A kernel module
    • A basic set of commands (mkfs and fsdb at a minimum)
  • There may be other commands to support filesystem features:
    • e2fsprogs - badblocks, blkid, chattr, debugfs, dumpe2fs, e2freefrag, e2fsck, e2image, e2label, e2undo, e4defrag, filefrag, findfs, findsuper, logsave, lsattr, mke2fs, resize2fs, tune2fs.
  • SPFS only has the following:
    • A kernel module, mkfs, fsdb and fillfs commands plus test programs.
2. SPFS Features / Properties
  • Single block size (2048 bytes)
  • 760 blocks in the whole filesystem (760 * 2048 byte block size = ~1.5GB?MB)
  • Maximum filename length of up to 28 characters
  • Multi-level directories (directories within directories)
  • File creation, deletion, rename, hard links, symlinks, …
  • File undelete using the SPFS fsdb command
3. Some Basic SPFS Concepts

  • SPFS Superblock

    • Contains information about the filesystem

    • Inode and data block usage

  • Inodes

    • 1 inode per file regardless of file type

    • Holds file size, ownershop, time stamps, which blocks are allocated

    • Directory entries

4. What Happens During mkfs?
  • Fill in the superblock structure fields
  • Write the superblock to disk
  • Write inodes 2 (root) and 3 (lost+found) to disk
  • Write directory entries for both directories
    • “.” and “..” for “lost+found”
    • “.”, “..” and “lost+found” for the root inode
5. Introducing mkfs and fsdb
  • Best way to learn the disk layout is to see it in action!
  • We’ll create a filesystem with mkfs and use fsdb to explore what’s there
  • Source code will be introduced soon

lost+found 目录是 Linux 和 Unix 文件系统中的一个特殊目录，通常存在于文件系统的根目录下。它的主要用途是存储在文件系统检查（例如，使用 fsck 命令）期间恢复的丢失文件或目录。

主要特点和用途
  1. 恢复丢失的文件：
    • 当文件系统发生损坏或崩溃时，文件系统检查工具会尝试修复错误，并可能找到一些无法与原有目录结构相匹配的孤立文件。这些文件会被放置在lost+found目录中。
  2. 文件命名：
    • 恢复的文件通常会被重命名为数字（例如，#1、#2），以便用户在恢复后可以检查它们。
  3. 存在于不同的文件系统中：
    • lost+found目录主要出现在使用ext2、ext3、ext4和其他一些Linux文件系统中。
  4. 文件系统检查：
    • lost+found目录是在文件系统创建时自动生成的，用户通常无需手动创建或删除它。运行文件系统检查（如fsck）时，工具会自动处理该目录中的文件。

Module Agenda

  • How to downlaod the source code
  • Looking through the directory structure
  • Walking through the mkfs and fsdb source code
entry.summary: SPFS

entry.title: descriptor
entry.content:
描述器

1. 入门

现在，让我们从最基本的示例开始，然后逐步添加新功能。

简单示例：返回常量的描述器

Ten类是一个描述器，其__get__()方法总是返回常量 10：

要使用描述器，它必须作为一个类变量存储在另一个类中：

用交互式会话查看普通属性查找和描述器查找之间的区别：

>>>

在 a.x 属性查找中，点运算符会找到存储在类字典中的 'x': 5。 在 a.y 查找中，点运算符会根据描述器实例的 __get__ 方法将其识别出来，调用该方法并返回 10 。

请注意，值 10 既不存储在类字典中也不存储在实例字典中。相反，值 10 是在调用时才取到的。

这个简单的例子展示了一个描述器是如何工作的，但它不是很有用。在查找常量时，用常规属性查找会更好。

在下一节中，我们将创建更有用的东西，即动态查找。

动态查找

有趣的描述器通常运行计算而不是返回常量：

交互式会话显示查找是动态的，每次都会计算不同的，经过更新的返回值:

除了说明描述器如何运行计算，这个例子也揭示了 __get__() 参数的目的。形参 self 接收的实参是 size，即 DirectorySize 的一个实例。形参 obj 接收的实参是 g 或 s，即 Directory 的一个实例。而正是 obj 让 __get__() 方法获得了作为目标的目录。形参 objtype 接收的实参是 Directory 类。

托管属性

描述器的一种流行用法是托管对实例数据的访问。描述器被分配给类字典中的公开属性，而实际数据作为私有属性存储在实例字典中。当访问公开属性时，会触发描述器的 __get__() 和 __set__() 方法。

在下面的例子中，age 是公开属性，*_age* 是私有属性。当访问公开属性时，描述器会记录下查找或更新的日志：

交互式会话展示中，对托管属性 age 的所有访问都被记录了下来，但常规属性 name 则未被记录：

>>>

此示例的一个主要问题是私有名称 _age 在类 LoggedAgeAccess 中是硬耦合的。这意味着每个实例只能有一个用于记录的属性，并且其名称不可更改。
entry.summary:
描述器

1.

entry.title: python元编程
entry.content:
Python元编程

1. 简介

元编程让程序能够生成、修改或分析自身的代码。Python的元编程通常涉及以下几个方面：

  1. 类和对象的动态创建：使用type()函数可以动态创建类。例如，可以在运行时生成新的类定义。
  2. 装饰器：装饰器是Python中常见的元编程技巧，可以在函数或方法被定义时修改其行为。
  3. 描述符：描述符允许你通过定义__get__、__set__和__delete__方法来控制属性的访问。
  4. 反射：使用getattr()、setattr()和hasattr()等内置函数，可以在运行时访问和修改对象的属性。
  5. 元类：元类是用于创建类的类，允许你在类被定义时自定义类的行为。
entry.summary: Python元编程

entry.content:
x86 SSE register

supported data types

control status mechanism

X86-SSE Overview

The original Streaming SIMD Extension, called SSE, was introduced with the Pentium III processor.

奔腾3：SSE

奔腾4：SSE2（双精度，整数）

SSE3（）

SSE4.1（dot products and data blending）

SSE4.2

BitField NameDescription
IEInvalid operation flagX86-SSE floating-point invalid operation error flag.
DEDenormal flagX86-SSE floating-point denormal error flag.
ZEDivide-by-zero flag
OEOverflow flag
UEUnderflow flag
PEPrecision flag
DAZDenormals are zeros
IMInvalid operation mask
DMDenormal mask
ZMDivide-by-zero-mask
OMOverflow mask
UMUnderflow mask
PMPrecision mask
RCRounding control
FZFlush to zero

非规范数的定义

非规范数是指在浮点表示中，不符合规范格式的数。这些数通常用来表示接近零但不等于零的值，允许更广泛的数值范围。虽然非规范数可以表示非常小的值，但它们的精度较低。
entry.summary:
x86 SSE register

supported data types

control status mechanism

entry.title: linear regression
entry.content:
线性回归

推导过程

Assuming that the independent variables are
$$
{\vec {x_{i}}}=\left[x_{1}^{i},x_{2}^{i},\ldots ,x_{m}^{i}\right]
$$
and the model’s parameters are
$$
{\vec {\beta }}=\left[\beta {0},\beta {1},\ldots ,\beta {m}\right]
$$
, then the model’s prediction would be
$$
y{i}\approx \beta {0}+\sum {j=1}^{m}\beta {j}\times x{j}^{i}
$$
If ${\vec {x{i}}}$ is extended to ${\vec {x{i}}}=\left[1,x{1}^{i},x{2}^{i},\ldots ,x_{m}^{i}\right]$ then $y_i$ would become a dot product of the parameter and the independent vectors, i.e.
$$
y_{i}\approx \sum {j=0}^{m}\beta {j}\times x{j}^{i}={\vec {\beta }}\cdot {\vec {x{i}}}
$$
In the least-squares setting, the optimum parameter vector is defined as such that minimizes the sum of mean squared loss:
$$
{\vec {\hat {\beta }}}={\underset {\vec {\beta }}{\mbox{arg min}}},L\left(D,{\vec {\beta }}\right)={\underset {\vec {\beta }}{\mbox{arg min}}}\sum {i=1}^{n}\left({\vec {\beta }}\cdot {\vec {x{i}}}-y_{i}\right)^{2}
$$
Now putting the independent and dependent variables in matrices $X$ and $Y$ respectively, the loss function can be rewritten as:
$$
{\begin{aligned}L\left(D,{\vec {\beta }}\right)&=|X{\vec {\beta }}-Y|^{2}\&=\left(X{\vec {\beta }}-Y\right)^{\textsf {T}}\left(X{\vec {\beta }}-Y\right)\&=Y^{\textsf {T}}Y-Y^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}-{\vec {\beta }}^{\textsf {T}}X^{\textsf {T}}Y+{\vec {\beta }}^{\textsf {T}}X^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}\end{aligned}}
$$
As the loss function is convex, the optimum solution lies at gradient zero. The gradient of the loss function is (using Denominator layout convention):
$$
{\begin{aligned}{\frac {\partial L\left(D,{\vec {\beta }}\right)}{\partial {\vec {\beta }}}}&={\frac {\partial \left(Y^{\textsf {T}}Y-Y^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}-{\vec {\beta }}^{\textsf {T}}X^{\textsf {T}}Y+{\vec {\beta }}^{\textsf {T}}X^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}\right)}{\partial {\vec {\beta }}}}\&=-2X^{\textsf {T}}Y+2X^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}\end{aligned}}
$$
Setting the gradient to zero produces the optimum parameter:
$$
{\begin{aligned}-2X^{\textsf {T}}Y+2X^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}&=0\\Rightarrow X^{\textsf {T}}X{\vec {\beta }}&=X^{\textsf {T}}Y\\Rightarrow {\vec {\hat {\beta }}}&=\left(X^{\textsf {T}}X\right)^{-1}X^{\textsf {T}}Y\end{aligned}}
$$

Note: The $\hat {\beta }$ obtained may indeed be the local minimum, one needs to differentiate once more to obtain the Hessian matrix and show that it is positive definite. This is provided by the Gauss–Markov theorem.
entry.summary:
线性回归

推导过程

Assuming that the independent variables are
$$<

entry.title: c++ memory模块
entry.content:
memory模块

1. 简介

​<memory>头文件提供了一些与内存管理相关的功能，包括智能指针、内存分配器和一些内存操作的工具

类
  • pointer_traits
分配器相关
  • allocator
  • allocator_traits
  • allocation_result
  • uses_allocator
智能指针
  • unique_ptr
  • shared_ptr
  • weak_ptr
辅助类
  • std::atomic<std::shared_ptr>
  • std::atomic<std::weak_ptr>
  • owner_less
  • owner_hash
  • owner_equal
  • enable_shared_from_this
  • bad_weak_ptr
  • default_delete
  • std::hash<std::unique_ptr>
  • std::hash<std::shared_ptr>
智能指针适配器
  • out_ptr_t
  • inout_ptr_t
标签
  • allocator_arg
  • allocator_arg_t
函数
用分配器参数构造
  • uses_allocator_construction_args
  • make_obj_using_allocator
  • uninitialized_construct_using_allocator
杂项
  • to_address
  • addressof
  • align
  • assume_aligned
生命周期管理
  • start_lifetime_as
  • start_lifetime_as_array
无初始化存储
  • uninitialized_copy
  • uninitialized_copy_n
  • uninitialized_fill
  • uninitialized_fill_n
  • uninitialized_move
  • uninitialized_move_n
  • uninitialized_default_construct
  • uninitialized_default_construct_n
  • uninitialized_value_construct
  • uninitialized_value_construct_n
  • construct_at
  • destroy_at
  • destroy
  • destroy_n
智能指针相关的操作
  • make_unique
  • make_unique_for_overwrite
  • operator <=>
  • allocate_shared
  • allocate_shared_for_overwrite
  • static_pointer_cast
  • dynamic_pointer_cast
  • const_pointer_cast
  • reinterpret_pointer_cast
  • get_deleter
  • operator<<(std::shared_ptr)
  • operator<<(std::unique_ptr)
  • std::swap(std::unique_ptr)
  • std::swap(std::shared_ptr)
  • std::swap(std::weak_ptr)
entry.summary: memory模块

entry.title: 01-简介
entry.content:
动手学深度学习v2

1. 内容

  • 深度学习基础：线性神经网络、多层感知机
  • 卷积神经网络：LeNet、AlexNet、VGG、Inception、ResNet
  • 循环神经网络：RNN、GRU、LSTM、seq2seq
  • 注意力机制：Attention、Transformer
  • 优化算法：SGD、Momentum、Adam
  • 高性能计算：并行、多GPU、分布式
  • 计算机视觉：目标检测、语义分割
  • 自然语言处理：词嵌入、BERT

2. 安装

  • 使用conda/miniconda环境

  • 安装需要的包

    pip install jupyter d2l torch torchvision

  • 下载代码并执行

    wget https://zh-v2.d2l.ai/d2l-zh.zipunzip d2l-zh.zipjupyter notebook

3. 范数

​范数（Norm）是数学中用来度量向量大小或长度的函数。它是一个从向量空间到非负实数的映射，通常用来描述向量的“距离”或“大小”。在不同的上下文中，范数可以有不同的定义，以下是几种常见的范数：

3.1 L2 范数（欧几里得范数）
  • 定义：对于一个向量$\mathbf{x} = (x_1, x_2, \ldots, x_n)$，其 L2 范数定义为：$|\mathbf{x}|_2 = \sqrt{x_1^2 + x_2^2 + \ldots + x_n^2}$
  • 含义：表示从原点到该点的欧几里得距离。
3.2 L1 范数（曼哈顿范数）
  • 定义：对于一个向量 x\mathbf{x}x，其 L1 范数定义为： $|\mathbf{x}|_1 = |x_1| + |x_2| + \ldots + |x_n|$
  • 含义：表示在各个坐标轴上的绝对值之和，也可以看作是在各个维度上的距离。
3.3 L∞ 范数（无穷范数）
  • 定义：对于一个向量$\mathbf{x}$，其$L\infty$ 范数定义为：$|\mathbf{x}|_\infty = \max(|x_1|, |x_2|, \ldots, |x_n|)$
  • 含义：表示向量中最大绝对值的元素。
3.4 范数的性质
  • 非负性：范数总是非负的，即$|\mathbf{x}| \geq 0$，且当且仅当$\mathbf{x}$是零向量时，范数为零。
  • 齐次性：对于任意标量$\alpha$和向量$\mathbf{x}$，有$|\alpha \mathbf{x}| = |\alpha| |\mathbf{x}|$。
  • 三角不等式：对于任意向量$\mathbf{x}$和$\mathbf{y}$，有$|\mathbf{x} + \mathbf{y}| \leq |\mathbf{x}| + |\mathbf{y}|$。

4. 矩阵

4.1 正定矩阵（Positive Definite Matrix）
定义

一个$n \times n$的实对称矩阵$A$被称为正定矩阵，如果对于任意非零向量$\mathbf{x}$都满足：$\mathbf{x}^T A \mathbf{x} > 0$

这意味着矩阵$A$在该向量下的二次型始终为正值。

性质

正定矩阵有以下几个重要性质：

  1. 对称性：正定矩阵必须是对称的，即$A = A^T$。
  2. 特征值：所有特征值均为正数。
  3. 行列式：所有主子行列式均为正。
  4. Cholesky分解：正定矩阵可以进行Cholesky分解，表示为$A = LL^T$，其中$L$是一个下三角矩阵。
  5. 可逆性：正定矩阵是可逆的，其行列式不为零。

示例

考虑以下$2 \times 2$矩阵：

$$A = \begin{pmatrix} 2 & 1 \ 1 & 2 \end{pmatrix}$$

  • 对称性：矩阵$A$是对称的，因为$A = A^T$。

  • 正定性：
    $$
    \mathbf{x}^T A \mathbf{x} = \begin{pmatrix} x_1 & x_2 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} 2 & 1 \ 1 & 2 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x_1 \ x_2 \end{pmatrix} = 2x_1^2 + 2x_1x_2 + 2x_2^2
    $$

    对于任意非零向量$\mathbf{x}$$，此值大于零，因此$$A$是正定的。

4.2 正交矩阵（Orthogonal Matrix）
定义

​一个$n \times n$的实矩阵$Q$被称为正交矩阵，如果其转置等于其逆矩阵，即：$Q^T Q = QQ^T = I$

其中$I$是$n \times n$的单位矩阵。

性质

正交矩阵具有几个显著的性质：

  1. 列（行）正交性：正交矩阵的列向量（或行向量）是正交的，且每个列向量（或行向量）的长度为 1。这意味着：
    $$
    \mathbf{q}_i^T \mathbf{q}_j = 0 \quad (\text{对于 } i \neq j) \
    |\mathbf{q}_i| = 1
    $$
    其中$\mathbf{q}_i$是矩阵$Q$的第$i$列。

  2. 行列式：正交矩阵的行列式为$1$或$-1$。

  3. 保持内积：正交矩阵保持向量的内积，即对于任意向量$\mathbf{x}$和$\mathbf{y}$，有：$\langle Q\mathbf{x}, Q\mathbf{y} \rangle = \langle \mathbf{x}, \mathbf{y} \rangle$

  4. 保持长度：正交矩阵保持向量的长度，即：$|Q\mathbf{x}| = |\mathbf{x}|$

示例

考虑以下$2 \times 2$正交矩阵：
$$
Q = \begin{pmatrix} \cos \theta & -\sin \theta \ \sin \theta & \cos \theta \end{pmatrix}
$$
这里$\theta$是一个角度。

  • 验证正交性：
    $$
    Q^T = \begin{pmatrix} \cos \theta & \sin \theta \ -\sin \theta & \cos \theta \end{pmatrix}
    $$
    计算$Q^T Q$：
    $$
    Q^TQ = \begin{pmatrix} \cos \theta & \sin \theta \ -\sin \theta & \cos \theta \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} \cos \theta & -\sin \theta \ \sin \theta & \cos \theta \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} \cos^2 \theta + \sin^2 \theta & 0 \ 0 & \cos^2 \theta + \sin^2 \theta \end{pmatrix} = I
    $$
应用

正交矩阵在许多领域中有广泛应用，包括：

  • 计算机图形学：用于旋转和平移变换。
  • 信号处理：用于傅里叶变换和信号的正交基。
  • 数值线性代数：在QR分解中，正交矩阵用于求解线性方程组和特征值问题。
4.3 置换矩阵

​置换矩阵（Permutation Matrix）是一个方阵，其中的元素仅为0和1，每一行和每一列恰好有一个元素为1，其余元素为0。置换矩阵用于表示对向量或矩阵的置换操作。

定义

一个$n \times n$的置换矩阵$P$满足以下条件：

  1. 每一行恰好有一个元素为1，其他元素为0。
  2. 每一列也恰好有一个元素为1，其他元素为0。
特性
  1. 乘法：如果用置换矩阵$P$乘以一个列向量$\mathbf{x}$，则结果是对向量$\mathbf{x}$的元素进行置换。例如，若$P$是一个置换矩阵，它将 $\mathbf{x}$的元素重新排列。
  2. 可逆性：置换矩阵是可逆的，且其逆矩阵也是一个置换矩阵。实际上，置换矩阵的逆就是它的转置，即$P^{-1} = P^T$。
  3. 行列式：置换矩阵的行列式值为$1$或$−1$，具体取决于置换的奇偶性（奇置换的行列式为$-1$，偶置换的行列式为$1$）。

示例

考虑一个$3 \times 3$的置换矩阵：
$$
P = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 0 \ 0 & 0 & 1 \ 1 & 0 & 0 \end{pmatrix}
$$

这个矩阵表示将向量的第一个元素移到第三个位置，第二个元素移到第一个位置，第三个元素移到第二个位置。

置换矩阵的应用

置换矩阵在许多领域中有广泛的应用，包括：

  • 线性代数：用于矩阵的行或列置换。
  • 组合数学：在排列和组合问题中表示元素的重新排列。
  • 计算机科学：在排序算法和图形处理中的应用。
entry.summary: 动手学深度学习v2

entry.title: python mixin
entry.content:
Python Mixin

1. 简介

​Mixin是一种设计模式，用于创建可复用的类，这些类可以与其他类组合，以增强其功能。Mixin通常不作为独立的类使用，而是作为基类被其他类继承，提供特定的行为或功能，而不需要成为该类的主要部分。

特点
  1. 可复用性：Mixin允许将功能模块化，使得相同的功能可以在多个类中复用。
  2. 单一职责：Mixin通常负责提供一种特定的功能或行为，而不是承担类的主要业务逻辑。这有助于保持代码的清晰性和可维护性。
  3. 组合性：可以将多个Mixin类组合到一个类中，从而为该类提供多种功能。这种方式支持多重继承。

示例

以下是一个简单的示例，展示了如何在Python中使用Mixin：

2. 参考

  1. Mixins
entry.summary: Python Mixin

entry.title: 最大似然估计
entry.content:
最大似然估计

​在统计学中，最大似然估计（maximum likelihood estimation，简作MLE），也称极大似然估计，是用来估计一个概率模型的参数的一种方法。

最大似然估计的原理

给定一个概率分布$D$，已知其概率密度函数（连续分布）或概率质量函数（离散分布）为$f_D$，以及一个分布参数$\theta$，我们可以从这个分布中抽出一个具有$n$个值的采样$X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$，利用$f_D$计算出其似然函数：
$$
{\mbox{L}}(\theta \mid x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})=f_{\theta }(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n}).
$$
若$D$是离散分布，$f_{\theta}$即是在参数为$\theta$时观测到这一采样的概率；若其是连续分布，$f_{\theta}$则为$X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$联合分布的概率密度函数在观测值处的取值。一旦我们获得$X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$，我们就能求得一个关于$\theta$的估计。最大似然估计会寻找关于$\theta$的最可能的值（即，在所有可能的$\theta$取值中，寻找一个值使这个采样的“可能性”最大化）。从数学上来说，我们可以在$\theta$的所有可能取值中寻找一个值使得似然函数取到最大值。这个使可能性最大的$\widehat {\theta }$值即称为$\theta$的最大似然估计。由定义，最大似然估计是样本的函数。

例子

​考虑一个抛硬币的例子。假设这个硬币正面跟反面轻重不同。我们把这个硬币抛80次（即，我们获取一个采样$x_1=H,x_2=T,…,x_{80}=T$并把正面的次数记下来，正面记为H，反面记为T）。并把抛出一个正面的概率记为$p$，抛出一个反面的概率记为$1-p$（因此，这里的$p$即相当于上方的$\theta$）。假设我们抛出了49个正面，31个反面，即49次H，31次T。假设这个硬币是我们从一个装了三个硬币的盒子里头取出的。这三个硬币抛出正面的概率分别为$p=1/3, p=1/2, p=2/3$，这些硬币没有标记，所以我们无法知道哪个是哪个。使用最大似然估计，基于二项分布中的概率质量函数公式，通过这些试验数据（即采样数据)，我们可以计算出哪个硬币的可能性最大。这个似然函数取以下三个值中的一个：
$$
{\begin{matrix}\mathbb {L} (p=1/3\mid {\mbox{H=49, T=31 }})&=&\mathbb {P} ({\mbox{H=49, T=31 }}\mid p=1/3)&=&{80 \choose 49}(1/3)^{49}(1-1/3)^{31}\approx 0.000\&&\\mathbb {L} (p=1/2\mid {\mbox{H=49, T=31 }})&=&\mathbb {P} ({\mbox{H=49, T=31 }}\mid p=1/2)&=&{80 \choose 49}(1/2)^{49}(1-1/2)^{31}\approx 0.012\&&\\mathbb {L} (p=2/3\mid {\mbox{H=49, T=31 }})&=&\mathbb {P} ({\mbox{H=49, T=31 }}\mid p=2/3)&=&{80 \choose 49}(2/3)^{49}(1-2/3)^{31}\approx 0.054\\end{matrix}}
$$

我们可以看到当${\widehat {p}}=2/3$时，似然函数取得最大值。
显然地，这硬币的公平性和那种抛出后正面的概率是$\frac{2}{3}$的硬币是最接近的。这就是$p$的最大似然估计。
entry.summary:
最大似然估计

​ 在统计学中，最大似然估计（maximum likelihood est

entry.title: logistic function
entry.content:
Logistic Function

A logistic function or logistic curve is a common S-shaped curve (sigmoid curve) with the equation
$$
f(x)={\frac {L}{1+e^{-k(x-x_{0})}}}
$$
where

  • $L$ is the carrying capacity, the supremum of the values of the function;

  • $k$ is the logistic growth rate, the steepness of the curve; and

  • $x_0$ is the $x$ value of the function’s midpoint

The logistic function has domain the real numbers, the limit as $x \rightarrow -\infty$ is 0, and the limit as $x \rightarrow +\infty$ is $L$.

The standard logistic function, depicted at right, where $L = 1, k = 1, x_0 = 0$ has the equation
$$
f(x)={\frac {1}{1+e^{-x}}}
$$
and is sometimes simply called the sigmoid. It is also sometimes called the expit, being the inverse function of the logit.

1. Mathematical properties

1.1 Symmetries

$$
1 - f(x) = f(-x)
$$

Further, $x \mapsto f(x) - \frac{1}{2}$ is an odd function.

1.2 Inverse function

The logistic function is the inverse of the natural logit function
$$
\operatorname {logit} p=\log {\frac {p}{1-p}}{\text{ for }}0<p<1
$$

and so converts the logarithm of odds into a probability. The conversion from the log-likelihood ratio of two alternatives also takes the form of a logistic curve.

证：

令$p=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}} \Rightarrow \operatorname{logit} p = \log \frac{\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}} }{1-\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}} } = \log e^x = x$
entry.summary:
Logistic Function

A

entry.title: 无穷大量的性质
entry.content:
无穷大量的性质

1. 性质

  • 有限个无穷大之积仍是无穷大。
  • 有界量与无穷大量之和仍然是无穷大。
  • 有界函数与无穷大量之和仍然是无穷大量。
  • 若$\lim_{x \to x_0}f(x) = \infty, \lim_{x \to x_0}g(x) = C (\ne 0)$，则$\lim_{x \to x_0}f(x)g(x) = \infty$
  • 若$\lim_{x \to x_0}f(x) = C (\ne 0), \lim_{x \to x_0}g(x) = 0$，则$\lim_{x \to x_0}\frac{f(x)}{g(x)} = \infty$
entry.summary: 无穷大量的性质

entry.title: Ext2文件系统
entry.content:
Ext2文件系统

  • Blocks
  • Block Groups
  • Directories
  • Inodes
  • Superblocks
  • Symbolic Links

Superblock结构

偏移（字节）大小（字节）字段
04s_inodes_count
44s_blocks_count
84s_r_blocks_count
124s_free_blocks_count
164s_free_inodes_count
204s_first_data_block
244s_log_block_size
284s_log_frag_size
324s_blocks_per_group
364s_frags_per_group
404s_inodes_per_group
444s_mtime
484s_wtime
522s_mnt_count
542s_max_mnt_count
562s_magic
582s_state
602s_errors
622s_minor_rev_level
644s_lastcheck
684s_checkinterval
724s_creator_os
764s_rev_level
802s_def_resuid
822s_def_resgid

s_inodes_count:

​32bit value indicating the total number of inodes, both used and free, in the file system. This value must be lower or equal to (s_inodes_per_group * number of block groups). It must be equal to the sum of the inodes defined in each block group.

s_blocks_count: 32bit value indicating the total number of blocks in the system including all used, free and reserved. This value must be lower or equal to (s_blocks_per_group * number of block groups). It can be lower than the previous calculation if the last block group has a smaller number of blocks than s_blocks_per_group du to volume size. It must be equal to the sum of the blocks defined in each block group.

s_r_blocks_count: 32bit value indicating the total number of blocks reserved for the usage of the super user. This is most useful if for some reason a user, maliciously or not, fill the file system to capacity; the super user will have this specified amount of free blocks at his disposal so he can edit and save configuration files.

s_free_blocks_count: 32bit value indicating the total number of free blocks, including the number of reserved blocks (see s_r_blocks_count). This is a sum of all free blocks of all the block groups.

s_free_inodes_count: 32bit value indicating the total number of free inodes. This is a sum of all free inodes of all the block groups.

s_first_data_block: 32bit value identifying the first data block, in other word the id of the block containing the superblock structure.

Note that this value is always 0 for file systems with a block size larger than 1KB, and always 1 for file systems with a block size of 1KB. The superblock is always starting at the 1024th byte of the disk, which normally happens to be the first byte of the 3rd sector.

s_log_block_size: The block size is computed using this 32bit value as the number of bits to shift left the value 1024. This value may only be non-negative.

Common block sizes include 1KiB, 2KiB, 4KiB and 8Kib. For information about the impact of selecting a block size, see Impact of Block Sizes.

Note

In Linux, at least up to 2.6.28, the block size must be at least as large as the sector size of the block device, and cannot be larger than the supported memory page of the architecture.

s_log_frag_size:

The fragment size is computed using this 32bit value as the number of bits to shift left the value 1024. Note that a negative value would shift the bit right rather than left.

Note

As of Linux 2.6.28 no support exists for an Ext2 partition with fragment size smaller than the block size, as this feature seems to not be available.

s_blocks_per_group:

​32bit value indicating the total number of blocks per group. This value in combination with s_first_data_block can be used to determine the block groups boundaries. Due to volume size boundaries, the last block group might have a smaller number of blocks than what is specified in this field.

s_frags_per_group:

​32bit value indicating the total number of fragments per group. It is also used to determine the size of the block bitmap of each block group. 假设一个块的大小为 4096 字节，而碎片的大小为 1024 字节，则一个块可以包含 4 个碎片。

s_inodes_per_group:

​32bit value indicating the total number of inodes per group. This is also used to determine the size of the inode bitmap of each block group. Note that you cannot have more than (block size in bytes * 8) inodes per group as the inode bitmap must fit within a single block. This value must be a perfect multiple of the number of inodes that can fit in a block ((1024<<s_log_block_size)/s_inode_size).

s_mtime:

​Unix time, as defined by POSIX, of the last time the file system was mounted.

s_wtime:

​Unix time, as defined by POSIX, of the last write access to the file system.

s_mnt_count:

​16bit value indicating how many time the file system was mounted since the last time it was fully verified.

s_max_mnt_count:

​16bit value indicating the maximum number of times that the file system may be mounted before a full check is performed.

s_magic:

​16bit value identifying the file system as Ext2. The value is currently fixed to EXT2_SUPER_MAGIC of value 0xEF53.

s_state:

​16bit value indicating the file system state. When the file system is mounted, this state is set to EXT2_ERROR_FS. After the file system was cleanly unmounted, this value is set to EXT2_VALID_FS.

When mounting the file system, if a valid of EXT2_ERROR_FS is encountered it means the file system was not cleanly unmounted and most likely contain errors that will need to be fixed. Typically under Linux this means running fsck.

Table 3.4. Defined s_state Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_VALID_FS1Unmounted cleanly
EXT2_ERROR_FS2Errors detected

s_errors:

​16bit value indicating what the file system driver should do when an error is detected. The following values have been defined:

Table 3.5. Defined s_errors Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_ERRORS_CONTINUE1continue as if nothing happened
EXT2_ERRORS_RO2remount read-only
EXT2_ERRORS_PANIC3cause a kernel panic

s_minor_rev_level:

​16bit value identifying the minor revision level within its revision level.

在 EXT2 文件系统的超级块中，s_minor_rev_level 字段用于指示文件系统的次要版本号。这一字段的作用主要体现在以下几个方面：

作用

  1. 版本控制：
    • s_minor_rev_level 用于跟踪 EXT2 文件系统的次要版本更新。这些次要版本通常涉及小的改进或bug修复，而不是大规模的功能改变。
  2. 兼容性：
    • 通过检查 s_minor_rev_level，操作系统可以确定文件系统的具体版本，从而确保兼容性。不同的次要版本可能在实现上存在细微差别，了解这一版本号有助于在读取或写入文件系统时采取适当的措施。
  3. 扩展特性：
    • 该字段为未来的扩展提供了灵活性，允许在不改变主要版本号的情况下，增加新的功能或特性。

s_lastcheck:

​Unix time, as defined by POSIX, of the last file system check.

s_checkinterval:

​Maximum Unix time interval, as defined by POSIX, allowed between file system checks.

s_creator_os:

​32bit identifier of the os that created the file system. Defined values are:

Table 3.6. Defined s_creator_os Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_OS_LINUX0Linux
EXT2_OS_HURD1GNU HURD
EXT2_OS_MASIX2MASIX
EXT2_OS_FREEBSD3FreeBSD
EXT2_OS_LITES4Lites

s_rev_level:

​32bit revision level value.

Table 3.7. Defined s_rev_level Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_GOOD_OLD_REV0Revision 0
EXT2_DYNAMIC_REV1Revision 1 with variable inode sizes, extended attributes, etc.

s_def_resuid:

​16bit value used as the default user id for reserved blocks.

Note

​In Linux this defaults to EXT2_DEF_RESUID of 0.

s_def_resgid:

​16bit value used as the default group id for reserved blocks.

Note

​In Linux this defaults to EXT2_DEF_RESGID of 0.

EXT2_DYNAMIC_REV Specific
偏移（字节）大小（字节）字段
844s_first_ino
882s_inode_size
902s_block_gourp_nr
924s_feature_compat
964s_feature_incompat
1004s_feature_ro_compat
10416s_uuid
12016s_volume_name
13664s_last_mounted
2004s_algo_bitmap

s_first_ino:

​32bit value used as index to the first inode useable for standard files. In revision 0, the first non-reserved inode is fixed to 11 (EXT2_GOOD_OLD_FIRST_INO). In revision 1 and later this value may be set to any value.

s_inode_size:

​16bit value indicating the size of the inode structure. In revision 0, this value is always 128 (EXT2_GOOD_OLD_INODE_SIZE). In revision 1 and later, this value must be a perfect power of 2 and must be smaller or equal to the block size (1<<s_log_block_size).

s_block_group_nr:

​16bit value used to indicate the block group number hosting this superblock structure. This can be used to rebuild the file system from any superblock backup.

s_feature_compat:

​32bit bitmask of compatible features. The file system implementation is free to support them or not without risk of damaging the meta-data.

Table 3.8. Defined s_feature_compat Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_FEATURE_COMPAT_DIR_PREALLOC
0x0001Block pre-allocation for new directories
EXT2_FEATURE_COMPAT_IMAGIC_INODES
0x0002
EXT3_FEATURE_COMPAT_HAS_JOURNAL
0x0004An Ext3 journal exists
EXT2_FEATURE_COMPAT_EXT_ATTR
0x0008Extended inode attributes are present
EXT2_FEATURE_COMPAT_RESIZE_INO
0x0010Non-standard inode size used
EXT2_FEATURE_COMPAT_DIR_INDEX
0x0020Directory indexing (HTree)

s_feature_incompat:

32bit bitmask of incompatible features. The file system implementation should refuse to mount the file system if any of the indicated feature is unsupported.

An implementation not supporting these features would be unable to properly use the file system. For example, if compression is being used and an executable file would be unusable after being read from the disk if the system does not know how to uncompress it.

Table 3.9. Defined s_feature_incompat Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_FEATURE_INCOMPAT_COMPRESSION
0x0001Disk/File compression is used
EXT2_FEATURE_INCOMPAT_FILETYPE
0x0002
EXT3_FEATURE_INCOMPAT_RECOVER
0x0004
EXT3_FEATURE_INCOMPAT_JOURNAL_DEV
0x0008
EXT2_FEATURE_INCOMPAT_META_BG
0x0010

s_feature_ro_compat:

​32bit bitmask of “read-only” features. The file system implementation should mount as read-only if any of the indicated feature is unsupported.

Table 3.10. Defined s_feature_ro_compat Values

Constant NameValueDescription
EXT2_FEATURE_RO_COMPAT_SPARSE_SUPER
0x0001Sparse Superblock
EXT2_FEATURE_RO_COMPAT_LARGE_FILE
0x0002Large file support, 64-bit file size
EXT2_FEATURE_RO_COMPAT_BTREE_DIR
0x0004Binary tree sorted directory files

s_uuid:

128bit value used as the volume id. This should, as much as possible, be unique for each file system formatted.

s_volume_name:

16 bytes volume name, mostly unusued. A valid volume name would consist of only ISO-Latin-1 characters and be 0 terminated.

s_last_mounted:

64 bytes directory path where the file system was last mounted. While not normally used, it could serve for auto-finding the mountpoint when not indicated on the command line. Again the path should be zero terminated for compatibility reasons. Valid path is constructed from ISO-Latin-1 characters.

s_algo_bitmap:

​32bit value used by compression algorithms to determine the compression method(s) used.

Note

Compression is supported in Linux 2.4 and 2.6 via the e2compr patch. For more information, visit http://e2compr.sourceforge.net/

Table 3.11. Defined s_algo_bitmap Values

Constant NameBit NumberDescription
EXT2_LZV1_ALG0Binary value of 0x00000001
EXT2_LZRW3A_ALG1Binary value of 0x00000002
EXT2_GZIP_ALG2Binary value of 0x00000004
EXT2_BZIP2_ALG3Binary value of 0x00000008
EXT2_LZO_ALG4Binary value of 0x00000010
Performance Hints
偏移（字节）大小（字节）字段
2041s_prealloc_blocks
2051s_prealloc_dir_blocks
2062(alignment)

s_prealloc_blocks:

​8-bit value representing the number of blocks the implementation should attempt to pre-allocate when creating a new regular file.

Linux 2.6.28 will only perform pre-allocation using Ext4 although no problem is expected if any version of Linux encounters a file with more blocks present than required.

s_prealloc_dir_blocks:

​8-bit value representing the number of blocks the implementation should attempt to pre-allocate when creating a new directory.

Linux 2.6.28 will only perform pre-allocation using Ext4 and only if the EXT4_FEATURE_COMPAT_DIR_PREALLOC flag is present. Since Linux does not de-allocate blocks from directories after they were allocated, it should be safe to perform pre-allocation and maintain compatibility with Linux.

Journaling Support
偏移（字节）大小（字节）字段
20816s_journal_uuid
2244s_journal_inum
2284s_journal_dev
2324s_last_orphan
entry.summary:
Ext2文件系统

  • Blocks
  • Block Groups
  • Di

entry.title: leetcode 1545
entry.content:
1. 题目要求

给你两个正整数n和k，二进制字符串$S_n$的形成规则如下：

  • $S_1$ = "0"
  • 当 i > 1 时，$S_i$ = $S_{i-1}$ + “1” + reverse(invert(Si-1))

其中+表示串联操作，reverse(x)返回反转x后得到的字符串，而invert(x)则会翻转x中的每一位（0变为1，而1变为0）。

例如，符合上述描述的序列的前4个字符串依次是：

  • $S_1$ = "0"
  • $S_2$ = "0**1**1"
  • $S_3$ = "011**1**001"
  • $S_4$ = "0111001**1**0110001"

请你返回$S_n$的第 k 位字符 ，题目数据保证k一定在$S_n$长度范围以内。

示例 1：

示例 2：

示例 3：

示例 4：

提示：

  • $1 \le n \le 20$
  • $1 \le k \le 2^n - 1$

2. 解法

2.1 暴力

时间复杂度：$O(2^n)$

空间复杂度：$O(2^n)$

2.2 递归

时间复杂度：$O(n)$

空间复杂度：$O(n)$

2.3 bit操作
entry.summary:
1. 题目要求

给你两个正整数n和k，二进制字符串$S_n$的形成规

entry.title: leetcode 1593
entry.content:
1593. 拆分字符串使唯一子字符串的数目最大

1. 题目要求

​给你一个字符串s，请你拆分该字符串，并返回拆分后唯一子字符串的最大数目。

字符串s拆分后可以得到若干非空子字符串 ，这些子字符串连接后应当能够还原为原字符串。但是拆分出来的每个子字符串都必须是 唯一的 。

注意：子字符串是字符串中的一个连续字符序列。

示例 1：

示例 2：

示例 3：

提示：

  • 1 <= s.length <= 16
  • s 仅包含小写英文字母

2. 解法

2.1 回溯

时间复杂度：$O(n\cdot 2^n)$

空间复杂度：$O(n)$

2.2 回溯+剪枝
entry.summary: 1593. 拆分字符串使唯一子字符串的数目最大

entry.title: 无穷小量
entry.content:
无穷小量

1. 定义

若$\lim_{x \to x_0}f(x) = 0$，称$f(x)$当$x$趋于$x_0$时是无穷小量。

例$\lim_{x \to \infty}\frac{1}{x} = 0$称$\frac{1}{x}$当$x \to \infty$是无穷小量。

2. 无穷小量性质

性质1：有限个无穷小量仍是无穷小量。

性质2：有限个无穷小量之积仍是无穷小量。

有界量定义：若$\exists \delta_0 \gt 0, \exists M \gt 0$，当$x \in \overset{o}U(x_0, \delta_0)$时，都有$|f(x)| \le M$（常数），即$f(x)$在$x \in \overset{o}U(x_0, \delta_0)$内有界，当$x \to x_0$时是有界量。

$f(x)$是哟界函数$\Rightarrow f(x)$是有界量，反之不成立。

性质3：有界量与无穷小量之积仍是无穷小量。
entry.summary:
无穷小量

</

entry.title: 折叠表达式
entry.content:
Fold Expression

1. 概念

​折叠表达式（fold expression）是C++17引入的一种特性，允许对变长模板参数进行简单而优雅的操作。它简化了对参数包的处理，尤其是在需要对包中的所有元素进行某种操作（如求和、逻辑运算等）时。

例如，使用折叠表达式可以方便地计算参数包中所有元素的和：

C++14做法

注意区分
entry.summary: Fold Expression

entry.title: is_array
entry.content:
1. is_array

1.1 简介

​std::is_array是一个用于检测类型是否为数组类型的模板类，它是标准库<type_traits>头文件中的一部分（since C++11）。

If the program adds specializations for std::is_array or std::is_array_v, the behavior is undefined.

示例

1.2 源码实现

2. is_bounded_array

2.1 简介

​std::is_bounded_array是一个模板类，用于检查给定的类型是否是有界数组（since C++20）。

示例

Output

2.2 源码实现

3. is_unbounded_array

3.1 简介

​std::is_unbounded_array是一个模板类，用于检查给定的类型是否是无界数组（即数组的大小未在编译时确定）（since C++20）。

示例

3.2 源码实现

4. extent

4.1 简介

​std::extent是一个模板类，用于获取数组类型在某个维度上的大小。

示例

4.2 源码实现
entry.summary: 1. is_array

entry.title: leetcode 2938
entry.content:
leetcode 2938 区分黑球和白球

要求：

桌子上有 n 个球，每个球的颜色不是黑色，就是白色。

给你一个长度为 n 、下标从 0 开始的二进制字符串 s，其中 1 和 0 分别代表黑色和白色的球。

在每一步中，你可以选择两个相邻的球并交换它们。

返回「将所有黑色球都移到右侧，所有白色球都移到左侧所需的 最小步数」。

示例 1：

示例 2：

示例 3：

解法1：双指针

Algorithm

  • Initialize variables:
    • whitePosition to 0. This represents the next available position for a white ball.
    • totalSwaps to 0 to keep track of the total number of swaps required.
  • Iterate over each character in the string s:
    • If the character is '0' (a white ball):
      • Calculate the number of swaps needed by subtracting whitePosition from the current position. Add it to totalSwaps.
      • Increment whitePosition by 1 to mark the next available position for a white ball.
  • After the loop ends, return the value of totalSwaps.
解法2：从后往前推
entry.summary: leetcode 2938 区分黑球和白球</
